I see why the tent comp cracked

About the bleeding mechanism
It calculate by ur last hit damage - mob remaining hps =bleeding to other mobs
Bleeding value is not seperate among the mobs

Example, if u kill a mob with 3000 damages while this mob remaining hp was 1
The other mobs will suffer 2999 bleedings
It also works on boss battle in dream dive while boss changing to phase 2

Some player will use this mechanism to do huge damages(last hit) to boss at the start off the battle then the boss will eventually die due to bleeding even changing to phase 2<:Coffee:1240919421791375380>

Hello! Which Wheel of Destiny should i choose for Tulu?

Depend on what u have 1st
Unless u got all ard<:Coffee:1240919421791375380>
The first three dupes unlock new abilities or enhance am existing cards
After that, if you invest 4 more dupes it will unlock Overload ultimate/Exalt
The 8th dupes and 12th dupe (final dupe) each will increase level cap by 5 (first 3 dupes excluded from this count)
So in total you 15 copies of an awaker to fully develop them (first copy (Original) excluded from the count)
Depend on which team you prefer the most
